MINI MINUTES: Appearances: MELISSA MUEHLFELD, ESQ., MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY, 415.693.6205, FOR PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC'S Petition For Order Confirming Arbitration Award AND FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judgment signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
